summary: Iteration-6 retest of /intake after the 5 fixes from iteration_5. All 5 requested frontend checks PASS. (1) Outer IntakeCard toggle is now <div role='button' tabIndex=0> — confirmed TAG_NAME=DIV, role=button, tabindex=0 on [data-testid^='intake-card-toggle-']. (2) Zero React console warnings of the form '<button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' during the full upload→preview→fixer→remove flow. (3) intake-remove-<id> click removed the card on first click (cards 1→0 reliably, not flaky). (4) Dropping a 2nd PDF on a free session surfaces UpgradeDialog queryable via [role='dialog'] with aria-modal='true'. (5) Keyboard accessibility works — focusing the toggle row and pressing Enter collapses the previously-expanded card (fixer panel present → absent). (6) Fixer hover controls (↑/↓/←/→/trash) in Fixer rows all fire on first click: Move-down reordered headings correctly (['Research…','1.Intro','2.Solar','3.Wind','4.Concl'] → ['1.Intro','Research…','2.Solar','3.Wind','4.Concl']), Delete removed the last heading (5→4 rows). Backend regression skipped per request.
critical_code_review_comments: IntakeStudio.jsx FixerPanel Indent (←/→): cannot indent item at idx=0 (no previous sibling to parent to). Observed paddingLeft unchanged on first heading after clicking →. This is expected tree-indent behaviour, but consider disabling/greying the → button on idx=0 for discoverability (currently it silently no-ops).

IntakeStudio.jsx TinyBtn controls (↑/↓/←/→/trash) rely solely on title attributes — no data-testid. Adding testids like intake-heading-move-down-<idx>, intake-heading-trash-<idx> etc. would make UI tests more resilient across icon/locale changes.
Two 401s logged in console on /intake (unrelated to /intake feature — likely /api/auth/me probe on unauthenticated session). Harmless but noisy; consider silencing when no token is present.
test_credentials: Access gate password 'mind-mapper67' (REACT_APP_UNLOCK_KEY) works. No login used.
seed_data_creation: Two synthetic PDFs generated via reportlab: /tmp/test_intake.pdf (Research On Clean Energy, 4 headings), /tmp/test_intake2.pdf (Second Report On AI, 2 headings). No persistent backend data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration_5 HIGH and minor bugs are now verified fixed. IntakeCard outer element is a <div role='button' tabIndex=0> with onKeyDown(Enter/Space); UpgradeDialog has role='dialog' aria-modal='true'. Fixer TinyBtns (↑↓←→trash) are still missing data-testid — match them via button[title='Move up'|'Move down'|'Out-dent'|'Indent'|'Delete'] inside [data-testid^='intake-heading-']. Heading <li> testid pattern: intake-heading-<idx>; input testid: intake-heading-input-<idx>; fixer panel: intake-fixer-panel; fixer list: intake-fixer-list.
